text.tspan: (too many to all fit in context)
Two-stage retrieve-then-rerank is the dominant production pattern.
Stage 1 is cheap and high-recall; stage 2 is expensive and high-precision.
Different reranker families: cross-encoder, LLM judge, ColBERT (late interaction).
Goal: don't miss the relevant doc
Far more accurate than bi-encoder (the embedding model)
because query and chunk attend to EACH OTHER.
Cost: scales with N, but N is small.
